title: Monet DB giving wrong value from a table when a value is queried after insertion/ Data Loss
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE testtable (dim_id bigint AUTO_INCREMENT, dim_type varchar(100) NOT NULL, dim_value varchar(100) NOT NULL, UNIQUE KEY unique_dimension (dim_type, dim_value), PRIMARY KEY (dim_id));
SELECT dim_id, dim_type, dim_value FROM testtable WHERE dim_type='user' AND dim_value='user1';

CREATE TABLE test (roe_id bigint AUTO_INCREMENT, roe_type bigint NOT NULL, node_event_id bigint NOT NULL, dc_servername varchar(50), roe_start_date_withtz varchar(50), usr_id bigint, customgroup_id bigint, queuename_id bigint, exitstatus_id bigint);
INSERT INTO test (roe_type, node_event_id, dc_servername) VALUES (1, 100, 'server1');
key_bug_features: Incorrect value retrieval after data insertion
